invalidation.zh: 价格跌破2850（基于ATR 71.78和支撑）或资金费率Z-Score升至20%以上（显示空头压力缓解），则平仓。
invalidation.en: Close position if price breaks below 2850 (based on ATR 71.78 and support) or funding rate Z-Score rises above 20% (indicating short pressure easing).

invalidation.zh: 价格跌破115（基于ATR 3.37和支撑）或资金费率Z-Score升至-50%以上（显示空头压力显著缓解），则平仓。
invalidation.en: Close position if price breaks below 115 (based on ATR 3.37 and support) or funding rate Z-Score rises above -50% (indicating significant easing of short pressure).

invalidation.zh: 价格跌破820（基于ATR 13.47和支撑）或资金费率Z-Score降至50%以下（显示多头压力缓解），则平仓。
invalidation.en: Close position if price breaks below 820 (based on ATR 13.47 and support) or funding rate Z-Score falls below 50% (indicating long pressure easing).
